title: Runner status file (v1.1.0)
description: Runner-scoped lifecycle status (LOGGING_CONTRACT runner-lifecycle channel). ONE last-write-wins JSON per runner at <log_base>/<strategy>/status.json (<strategy>-multi for a multi-trader) — at the runner root, NOT mirrored per logical system; the runner's symbols are listed in logical_systems[]. Written atomically at startup (state=running) and shutdown (state=stopped + proven broker_disconnected). The Supervisor reads it directly for clean-stop proof and restart detection; it is NOT a JSONL log record.
